indicators.name: no cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: There are no stoves, ovens, or microwaves visible, which are essential for cooking.

indicators.name: no water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is necessary for food preparation and hygiene.

indicators.name: no hard prep surfaces
indicators.rationale: No countertops or hard washable work surfaces are available for food preparation tasks.

indicators.name: no storage for cooking utensils
indicators.rationale: There is no visible storage for cooking utensils or ingredients.

indicators.name: no entertainment media

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no water fixture, no hard prep surfaces, and no storage for cooking utensils or ingredients. The presence of gym equipment and a shower does not indicate a living room, but it does not contribute to the suitability for cooking.
